message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant Dispatcher
database Database
participant RSyncServer
participant Arbiter
participant Slave
participant Worker

box "Master"
participant Dispatcher
database Database
participant RSyncServer
participant Arbiter
end box

box "Worker"
participant Slave
participant Worker
end box

Client -> Dispatcher : Create a taskset
Client -> Dispatcher : Enqueue tasks
Client -> Dispatcher : Taskset request
Dispatcher -> Worker : Taskset dispatch
Dispatcher -> Database : Log the worker participation

== RSync ==
Dispatcher -> Worker : RSync

== Setup ==
Worker -> Worker : Worker setup
Worker -> Database : Add a worker setup log

alt [setup failed]
  Worker -> Dispatcher : Fail request
  Dispatcher -> Database : Mark the taskset as failed
  Dispatcher -> Worker : Notify the taskset is marked as failed
end

== Testing ==
Worker -> Slave : Spawn slaves
Slave -> Slave : Slave setup

Dispatcher -> Database : Dequeue a task
Database --> Dispatcher : Return a task
Dispatcher -> Database : Add a trial
Worker -> Worker : Execute a task
Worker -> Database : Add a trial result
Worker -> Dispatcher : Notify the trial result
Dispatcher -> Database : Query the trial result
Database --> Dispatcher : Respond to the query

alt [passed or pending]
  Dispatcher -> Database : Mark the task as finished
else [retry needed]
  Dispatcher -> Database : Enqueue the task
else [no more retries]
  Dispatcher -> Database : Mark the task as failed
end

Dispatcher -> Database : Dequeue a task
Database --> Worker : No tasks left
Worker -> Dispatcher : Check request
Dispatcher -> Database : Check whether all tasks are finished
Database --> Dispatcher :

alt [some tasks are left]
  Dispatcher -> Database : Enqueue the tasks
end

Dispatcher -> Database : Mark the taskset as finished
Dispatcher -> Worker : Notify the taskset is marked as finished
Worker -> Slave : Kill slaves
Worker -> Database : Add slave logs

Client -> Dispatcher : Query the status of the taskset
Dispatcher --> Client : Respond to the query

@enduml
